---
title: "MI"
generated: true
description: "Mutual-information cost `-mutual_information` (cross-modal)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._metric`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MI -->
```python
class MI
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:MI -->
Mutual-information cost `-mutual_information` (cross-modal).

Scalar (BFGS) path.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MI.cost -->
```python
cost(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Mutual-information cost $-I$ (negated for minimisation).

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MI.residual -->
```python
residual(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Not defined: [`MI`](../nitrix-register/MI.qmd) is not a least-squares metric.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MI.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(bins: int = 32, normalized: bool = False, range_moving: Optional[tuple[float, float]] = None, range_fixed: Optional[tuple[float, float]] = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:MI -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
